name: Github Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active github accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name FROM github_organization_members u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
